assertions.title: DemoGallery entry point renders all flow sections + scenario links

steps.action: Open /demo and inspect gallery headings and links
steps.expected: Paper Screen Gallery heading, all flow sections in order, canonical links present, variant links hidden from top-level list
steps.observed: Heading and all nine flow section labels were present; canonical spot-check links were present; /demo/import-error-corrupted and /demo/onboard-failed-rejected were absent from top-level links.

evidence.network: Browser navigation to /demo succeeded and rendered SPA gallery content.

steps.action: From /demo, click scenario links for welcome-first-time, import-load-backup, onboard-enter-package, create-keyset, shared-create-profile, dashboard-running, rotate-keyset-intake, rotate-share-enter-package, recover-collect-shares
steps.expected: Each click navigates to /demo/{id} and expected text is visible
steps.observed: All 9 spot-check navigations landed on expected /demo/{id} URLs and each expected text was visible.

evidence.network: Nine /demo/{id} route navigations succeeded via gallery link clicks.

assertions.title: Scenario chrome toolbar renders All screens + Prev/Next + Raw + Reference

steps.expected: Toolbar shows All screens, Previous, Next, Raw, Reference with correct destinations
steps.observed: All toolbar controls rendered with expected hrefs: /demo, /demo/welcome-returning-single, /demo/welcome-returning-many, /demo/welcome-returning-multi?chrome=0, /paper-reference/welcome-returning-multi.png.

steps.expected: Previous traverses to welcome-returning-single; Next traverses canonical sequence
steps.observed: Previous navigated to /demo/welcome-returning-single; Next returned to /demo/welcome-returning-multi then advanced to /demo/welcome-returning-many.

evidence.consoleErrors: none observed while traversing toolbar links
evidence.network: Navigations across canonical welcome scenarios succeeded via toolbar links.

steps.expected: Raw mode hides demo toolbar; normal mode restores it
steps.observed: Raw mode had no "All screens" toolbar text; removing query restored toolbar with "All screens" visible.

evidence.consoleErrors: none observed in raw/normal mode toggles

steps.action: Iterate all demo scenarios (canonical + variants), clearing console/errors before each open, then wait for networkidle + 500ms
steps.expected: 0 console.error and 0 pageerror events across every scenario
steps.observed: Scanned 51 scenarios; failureCount=0; no console.error or pageerror events detected.

evidence.network: Each scenario route /demo/{id} loaded and stabilized (networkidle + 500ms) during scan.

steps.action: Open representative /paper-reference/{id}.png assets for each flow in browser
steps.observed: Checked 9 representative paper-reference assets; allResolved=True; each loaded as image/png with no 404 text, console errors, or page errors.

evidence.network: Representative /paper-reference/*.png requests resolved in-browser as image/png (no 404 state observed).

summary: Tested 6 assigned browser assertions (VAL-CROSS-001/002/003/004/015/022) in session f885e149dacc__g4; all 6 passed with screenshot and console evidence captured.
